channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Death end re;Quest Code Z for Switch coming to Asia in English in 2026
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

Physical edition pre-orders open on April 16.

eastasiasoft will release the Switch version of dungeon RPG Death end re;Quest Code Z in English in Asia in 2026, the publisher announced. It will include English text and Japanese voice-overs. Physical edition pre-orders will open via Play-Asia on April 16 at 8:00 a.m. PT / 11:00 a.m. ET. (Use coupon code “GEMATSU2025″ to save.)

The physical edition will be available in two versions: a $39.99 standard edition, and a $59.99 limited edition including the game, manual, soundtrack CD, art book, Joy-Con stickers, mini case, acrylic standee, and a numbered certificate in a collector’s box. Only 2,000 limited editions will be produced.

Death end re;Quest Code Z first launched for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch on September 19, 2024 in Japan, followed by PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 4 on May 13, 2025 in the west, and PC via Steam on August 27, 2025 worldwide. While the Switch version was originally planned for release in the west, it was canceled for not complying with Nintendo guidelines.

Here is an overview of the game, via eastasiasoft:

About

Take the role of Sayaka as she navigates the deadly Strain Area in an attempt to rescue her friends! Death end re;Quest Code Z is a dungeon RPG with 3D exploration, strategic turn-based combat, an engaging dialogue-driven narrative and numerous endings, many involving gruesome deaths that Sayaka must avoid if she hopes to succeed in her quest. Watch out for traps, strategize through enemy encounters and be mindful of each step you take, delving as deep as possible before insanity consumes you!

Iris was born in World DE-1, a world that mirrors Earth in the 2000s. With her birth, a series of tragic loops was set in motion, which were gradually unraveled by the efforts of Arata Mizunashi and his team. With her goodwill restored, Iris created a copy of World DE-1 named World DE-1.5. Here, feuds gave way to friendship, each person a perfect cog in a perfect world. But a new crisis now threatens the peace. A mysterious man has entered the fray, and he leads a group of people who look identical to the world’s former heroes. Our new hero, Sayaka Hiwatari, confronts the rising chaos, where friends and foes seem impossible to distinguish.

And so the battle with another world enters a new phase! Will you survive and escape?

Key Features

  • Survive mazelike dungeons where death awaits around every turn!
  • Enhance weapons in town and prepare yourself for the battles ahead.
  • Spend time with friends, relax at home between dungeon runs and check your prized possessions!
  • Challenge the boss of each dungeon, rescue allies and escape before insanity takes hold.
  • Strategically plan your movements and pick your battles to avoid many possible death ends!

Watch a trailer and the opening movie below.

Trailer

Opening Movie



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/death-end-request-code-z-for-switch-coming-to-asia-in-english-in-2026
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Star Fire: Eternal Cycle coming to PS5, Xbox Series on April 23
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

A love letter to classic arcade side-scrollers.

Publishers E-Home Entertainment Development and Indie Herb Games, and developer Ethereal Fish Studio, will release side-scrolling beat ’em up game Star Fire: Eternal Cycle for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Microsoft Store on April 23 for $16.99, the companies announced. Microsoft Store pre-orders are available now at a 20 percent-off discount price of $13.59.

Star Fire: Eternal Cycle first launched for PC via Steam on September 8, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Star Fire: Eternal Cycle is a quick-to-pick-up, action-packed roguelite built for fast, satisfying gameplay—no steep learning curves, no overcomplicated systems. It combines the precision of side-scrolling action with the unpredictable buildcraft of roguelites, offering tight feedback, responsive movement, and random skill progression.

Key Features

  • Fluid, Skill-Based Combat – Dodge, dash, and unleash combos with satisfying precision. The core controls are simple, but leave plenty of room to master your moves. Every move feels good—because every hit counts.
  • Roguelite Replayability – Every stage, every loadout, every enemy lineup is different. With randomized skills and branching paths, no two runs play the same—keeping things fresh, surprising, and addictive.
  • Elemental Mayhem and Build Variety – With eight elemental types, multiple primary and secondary weapons, and a wide range of hero abilities, each run gives you the freedom to try something new. Customize your gear, mix elements, and develop a combat style that feels right for you.
  • Surprises Around Every Corner – Secret rooms. Random events. Weird mini-challenges. There’s always something unexpected waiting—and often, it pays off big.
  • Unlock More with Every Run – Collect resources from each playthrough to unlock badass new skins, powerful weapons, and permanent upgrades that crank up the chaos every time you play.


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/star-fire-eternal-cycle-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-on-april-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Horror comedy series Anthology of the Killer coming to PS5, Switch on April 14
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch

Currently available for PC.

Publisher harmony corp central committee and developer the catamites will release horror comedy series Anthology of the Killer for PlayStation 5 and Switch on April 14 for $7.99 / £6.49 / €7.99, the companies announced. A 10 percent-off discount will be available at launch

Anthology of the Killer first launched for PC via Steam on October 8, 2024.

Here is an overview of the game, via harmony corp central committee:

About

The complete horror comedy series!

Join protagonist BB as she collects material for her zines in a mysterious world of drinky birds, secret rooms, dream resorts, waterparks, bort dolls, immersive theater, beachfront novelty shirts, police men, serial killers, art freeports and unorthodox medical treatment. Nobody’s getting out of here alive!

  • Voice of the Killer – BB joins a call center on the edge of the city, but a horrible noise can be heard from the sea. Does the voice of the Killer sound out this far…?
  • Hands of the Killer – A strange sound is heard from within the walls of the apartment block – they say the hands of the Killer are roaming around.
  • Drool of the Killer – Beneath the tiles of the swimming pool complex, a new world is striving to be born. This is the TAMMY show, coming soon to a city near you.
  • Eyes of the Killer – It’s the hit of the season and applause rings out night after night. But why do all the people that come to see it disappear? What does “immersive theatre” mean… and will BB survive to tell anybody else?
  • Flesh of the Killer – BB and her friends sneak into a tax exempt freeport on the edge of the city. What kind of animal has been evolving underground in the forbidden Museum Of Moral Art?
  • Blood of the Killer – In the quiet country town the drinky birds lie dreaming and severed heads roll slowly down the street. BB must discover the terrible secret of the lost zine distro, or fall prey to its curse…
  • Ears of the Killer – A new music scene is forming – it’s known as “Crime Wave” and all of the songs are about killing people. Can BB and her sister ZZ outrun the New Wave, or is it true nothing can change the shape of things to come?
  • Heart of the Killer – At the Dream Resort the days slip by quietly in the murmuring pines. At night a dreadful vision of desire stalks the halls.
  • Face of the Killer – All the dogs in town are laughing: there is talk of a new play. As fireworks burst over the city, BB finds herself looking into the face of the Killer.

Collects all nine games in the series in one easy loader, complete with additional features like joypad support and bonus rooms. Comes with free zine. A miracle collaboration by thecatamites (Space Funeral, Goblet Grotto, 10 Beautiful Postcards) and Tommy Tone (Goblet Grotto, Magic Wand, 10 Beautiful Postcards original soundtracks) with diorama art and posters by comics artist A. Degen (Soft X-Ray: Mindhunters, The Marchenoir LIbrary).

“History is a nightmare—and loving it!!”

Watch a new trailer below.

PlayStation 5 and Switch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/horror-comedy-series-anthology-of-the-killer-coming-to-ps5-switch-on-april-14
